description: Expected PostgREST + DB RPC and data surface. Must match normalized DB grants and OpenAPI surface. execute_allowlist must be a strict subset. Data surface (schemas, tables, views) enforced by 9.6.

data_surface_exceptions.user_profiles: CONTRACTS S12 — privilege firewall exception. user_profiles SELECT granted to authenticated only. anon has no access.

notes: Populated 9.2. RPCs with explicit grants plus current_tenant_id. Internal trigger functions excluded. Data surface fields added 9.6: tables_exposed and views_exposed must match actual PostgREST-reachable objects for anon and authenticated roles.
